before:
def get_total(order)
  if order
    if order.active?
      if order.items&.any?
        order.items.sum(&:price)
      else
        0
      end
    else
      0
    end
  else
    0
  end
end
after:
def get_total(order)
  return 0 unless order
  return 0 unless order.active?
  return 0 unless order.items&.any?
  order.items.sum(&:price)
end
why_safe: Same nil/empty checks and return values; nesting replaced by guard clauses only.

before:
def classify(score)
  if score >= 90
    'A'
  else
    if score >= 80
      'B'
    else
      if score >= 70
        'C'
      else
        'F'
      end
    end
  end
end
after:
def classify(score)
  return 'A' if score >= 90
  return 'B' if score >= 80
  return 'C' if score >= 70
  'F'
end
why_safe: All conditions and return values preserved; nested if/else flattened with postfix return guards.
